ai_summary.one_liner: Embodied foundation model trained on 270K+ hours of real-world manipulation data, exhibiting phase transitions at 7B parameters and predictable power-law scaling
ai_summary.problem: Robotics lacks foundation models that scale predictably with data and compute, unlike LLMs
ai_summary.solution: GEN-0: multimodal pretraining on 270K+ hours of diverse real-world interaction data with harmonic reasoning for simultaneous thinking and acting
ai_summary.key_result: Up to 99% real-robot success rates; phase transition at 7B params; power-law scaling enabling performance prediction
limitations: Anonymized data partners make reproducibility difficult
No open-source model or dataset release

cover_caption: Figure 3. For real-robot evaluations, more pretraining data yields higher downstream average task success rates via closed-loop policy rollouts.
source_title: GEN-0: Embodied Foundation Models That Scale with Physical Interaction

figures.caption: Figure 1. Scaling GEN-0 model size (different colors) improves performance in terms of next-action validation prediction error (y-axis, lower is better) on a completely-withheld (i.e. zero-shot) long-horizon downstream task.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 1. GEN-0 모델 크기를 키우면(다른 색상) 완전히 보류된(즉, 제로샷) 장기 다운스트림 태스크에서 다음 행동 검증 예측 오차(y축, 낮을수록 좋음) 기준 성능이 향상된다.

figures.caption: Figure 2. With increasingly more pretraining data (different colors), multi-task model performance during post-training improves in terms of validation loss.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 2. 사전학습 데이터가 증가할수록(다른 색상) 후학습 중 멀티태스크 모델의 검증 손실이 개선된다.

figures.caption: Figure 2 (continued). Next action prediction error (4x4 grid) across all 16 task sets, showing improvement with more pretraining data.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 2 (계속). 16개 태스크 세트 전체의 다음 행동 예측 오차(4x4 그리드)로, 사전학습 데이터가 많을수록 개선된다.

figures.caption: Figure 3. For real-robot evaluations, more pretraining data yields higher downstream average task success rates via closed-loop policy rollouts.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 3. 실제 로봇 평가에서, 사전학습 데이터가 많을수록 폐루프 정책 롤아웃을 통한 다운스트림 평균 태스크 성공률이 높아진다.

figures.caption: Figure 4. Scaling laws provide prediction of asymptotic next action prediction error as a function of pretraining dataset size.
figures.caption_ko: Figure 4. 스케일링 법칙은 사전학습 데이터셋 크기에 따른 점근적 다음 행동 예측 오차의 예측을 제공한다.

figures.caption: Figure 5. GEN-0 is trained on orders of magnitude more real-world manipulation data than existing robotics datasets (as of Nov 2025).
figures.caption_ko: Figure 5. GEN-0은 기존 로보틱스 데이터셋 대비 수 자릿수 더 많은 실세계 조작 데이터로 학습되었다 (2025년 11월 기준).
